landing.heroSubtitle: Video + whiteboard + AI co-pilot + engagement analytics. All in one room. Payments go straight from student to tutor — zero platform fees.
landing.feature1Desc: Live co-pilot during sessions, emotion & engagement analytics, and your personal Second Brain.
landing.feature2Desc: 1:1 tutors, learning circles of 3-6, peer help and a karma system. For everyone, globally.
landing.feature3Desc: BLIK / bank transfer / Revolut go directly to the tutor. The platform never touches the money.
landing.step1: Find a tutor or a learning circle
landing.step2: Book a session — the calendar handles the rest
landing.step3: Meet in the session room with AI co-pilot
landing.step4: Get a report, flashcards and homework
landing.step5: Pay the tutor directly and rate the session
